name: ODAC25
curator: Meta FAIR-Chem (Sriram, Brabson, Medford, Sholl et al.)
size: ~70M DFT single-point calculations across ~15,000 MOFs (CO2/H2O/N2/O2 adsorption); a scale and diversity expansion of ODAC23
primaryPaper: Sriram et al., The Open DAC 2025 Dataset for Sorbent Discovery in Direct Air Capture, arXiv:2508.03162 (2025).
